meta.focus_summary_text:
🔥 Weekly AP Quant Radar — Technical Focus List

[AP-Clock]:
• $PPC 160/180 (rem 20d)

[ 📉 BREAKDOWNS (Below 200-SMA) ]
• $APP | NEWS+DVG+BD200 | -10.1% | Vol 0.8x | AppLovin 2026 revenue estimates revised upward to $1.45B
• $OKTA | NEWS+BD200 | -10.7% | Vol 0.8x | Okta forecasts slowest revenue growth since IPO
• $UBER | NEWS+BD200 | -14.7% | Vol 0.9x | Uber price target maintained at $114 by TD Cowen
• $PPC | NEWS+BD200 | -10.6% | Vol 1.0x | Pilgrim's Pride registers a bigger fall than the market
• $WLDN | NEWS+BD200 | -12.2% | Vol 0.7x | Willdan Group Q4 EPS beats estimates sharply
• $CVSA | NEWS+BD200 | -14.6% | Vol 1.1x | No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found

[ 🚀 STRENGTH (Above 200-SMA) ]
• $AGX | NEWS+X200 | +61.8% | Vol 0.7x | Argan set to join the S&P SmallCap 600
• $POWL | NEWS+X200 | +58.7% | Vol 0.9x | Powell Industries announces three-for-one stock split

🎯 Triggers: CVSA > 101.07 (EMA21) | UBER > 74.82 (EMA21) | APP > 462.72 (EMA21)

focus_view_model.news_headline: AppLovin 2026 revenue estimates revised upward to $1.45B
focus_view_model.news_summary: Bullish estimate revisions support a constructive fundamental view, but the chart is still technically damaged.

logic_pillars.technical: LatestPrice 461.45 is below SMA200 513.03, below EMA55 503.51, and just below EMA21 462.72. The primary structure remains DOWNTREND.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20 at 0.80 suggests quiet consolidation rather than high-conviction institutional accumulation.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: The analyst revision is supportive, but it has not yet repaired the damaged intermediate technical structure.

divergence.note: SA Overall is Strong Buy, while price remains -10.1 below SMA200 and still below EMA55 and EMA21.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Watch only. Initial stabilization requires reclaiming EMA21 462.72; stronger repair requires a daily close above EMA55 503.51.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: AppLovin 2026 revenue estimates revised upward to $1.45B · 18h · 1 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Okta forecasts slowest revenue growth since IPO
focus_view_model.news_summary: A quarterly beat was overshadowed by softer growth guidance, leaving the stock technically vulnerable despite a short-term bounce.

logic_pillars.technical: LatestPrice 80.85 is below SMA200 90.52 and below EMA55 82.81, while slightly above EMA21 79.07. The broader structure remains DOWNTREND.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20 at 0.77 indicates weak participation and does not confirm a durable repair attempt.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: Negative guidance is the active catalyst and helps explain why price remains below higher trend filters.

divergence.note: Price weakness and weak guidance are aligned; this is not a rating-versus-price divergence case.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Watch only. Price must first hold EMA21 79.07; stronger repair requires a daily close above EMA55 82.81.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Okta forecasts slowest revenue growth since IPO · 8d · 2 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Uber price target maintained at $114 by TD Cowen
focus_view_model.news_summary: Analyst support and autonomous-vehicle optimism provide a positive narrative, but price remains below EMA55 and SMA200.

logic_pillars.technical: LatestPrice 74.97 is below SMA200 87.91 and below EMA55 78.22, but slightly above EMA21 74.82. The broader structure remains DOWNTREND.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20 at 0.86 shows only modest participation and does not confirm strong institutional follow-through.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: The positive analyst and AV narrative has not yet repaired the intermediate technical damage.

divergence.note: Positive fundamental narrative contrasts with a chart still below SMA200 and EMA55.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Watch for a stronger daily close above EMA55 78.22. Price is only marginally above EMA21 74.82, so the setup is still fragile.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Uber price target maintained at $114 by TD Cowen · 14h · 2 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Pilgrim's Pride registers a bigger fall than the market
focus_view_model.news_summary: Negative estimate revisions and weak sentiment are reinforcing the current breakdown structure.

logic_pillars.technical: LatestPrice 37.38 is below SMA200 41.81, below EMA55 41.14, and below EMA21 41.07. Trend weakness is fully intact.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20 at 1.03 shows normal participation rather than capitulation or reversal-quality buying.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: Negative estimate revisions provide fundamental confirmation of the technical weakness.

divergence.note: Technical breakdown and negative sentiment are aligned.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Avoid new entry. Existing positions should treat EMA21 41.07 and SMA200 41.81 as overhead resistance zones.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Pilgrim's Pride registers a bigger fall than the market · 6d · 1 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Willdan Group Q4 EPS beats estimates sharply
focus_view_model.news_summary: Strong earnings surprise has not yet been validated by price, leaving the stock in a broken but watchable divergence setup.

logic_pillars.technical: LatestPrice 83.98 is below SMA200 95.68, below EMA55 106.60, and below EMA21 98.40. The stock remains in a clear DOWNTREND.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20 at 0.67 indicates weak participation and no meaningful buying confirmation.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: The earnings beat is positive, but the stock has not repaired any major technical damage.

divergence.note: Positive earnings surprise contrasts with a still-broken chart below all key moving averages.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Watch only. Initial repair requires a daily close above EMA21 98.40; stronger confirmation would require a close above EMA55 106.60.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Willdan Group Q4 EPS beats estimates sharply · 5d · 1 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found
focus_view_model.news_summary: The setup is interesting because of technical proximity and rating support, but no qualifying fresh catalyst was found in the required window.

logic_pillars.technical: LatestPrice 101.12 is below SMA200 118.42, below EMA55 104.08, and marginally above EMA21 101.07. This is a transitional repair attempt inside a broader downtrend.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20 at 1.14 is improved but still below the abnormal-volume threshold.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: No qualifying fresh external event was found; the interest comes from Buy-rated status and a tactical EMA21 test.

divergence.note: Buy-rated status contrasts with a chart that is still materially below SMA200 and below EMA55.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Watch for a daily close above EMA55 104.08. Longer-term repair would still require reclaiming SMA200 118.42.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found · n/a · 0 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Argan set to join the S&P SmallCap 600
focus_view_model.news_summary: Index inclusion adds a structural demand catalyst to an already powerful uptrend, reinforcing leadership status.

logic_pillars.technical: LatestPrice 472.86 is above SMA200 292.29, above EMA55 391.99, and above EMA21 431.69. Trend_status is UPTREND and the stock remains technically dominant.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20 at 0.67 is not elevated today, so the setup is trend-led rather than a fresh high-volume expansion.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: The index-add catalyst is positive and supports the existing trend rather than trying to repair a broken one.

divergence.note: SA Overall is only Hold, but the price structure and catalyst profile are stronger than the static rating suggests.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Hold strong while price remains above EMA21 431.69. A failure of EMA21 431.69 would shift attention to EMA55 391.99.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Argan set to join the S&P SmallCap 600 · 5d · 2 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Powell Industries announces three-for-one stock split
focus_view_model.news_summary: The stock split reinforces corporate confidence and visibility, but the latest price is slightly below EMA21 and volume is not elevated.

logic_pillars.technical: LatestPrice 515.20 is above SMA200 324.62 and above EMA55 471.94, but slightly below EMA21 518.26. The broader trend remains UPTREND, though near-term momentum has cooled.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20 at 0.92 shows normal participation and no strong re-acceleration.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: The stock-split catalyst is positive, but current price behavior argues for disciplined trend defense rather than aggressive chasing.

divergence.note: Positive corporate action exists, but the stock is no longer holding EMA21 cleanly, which tempers the otherwise strong trend profile.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Hold while monitoring for a recovery back above EMA21 518.26. If weakness continues, EMA55 471.94 becomes the more important defense line.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Powell Industries announces three-for-one stock split · 5d · 2 src
